basics.name: Aitor Aguirre-Ortuzar
basics.label: Professor and Researcher · Trustworthy AI
basics.summary: Doctor in Computer Engineering and teaching researcher at Mondragon Unibertsitatea. Member of the Intelligent Systems for Industrial Systems (SISI) research group. Research focused on Trustworthy AI: Scientific Machine Learning (SciML), probabilistic AI, and Explainable AI (XAI).

work.name: Mondragon Unibertsitatea – Faculty of Engineering (MGEP)
work.summary: Member of the Intelligent Systems for Industrial Systems (SISI) research group, specialising in Data Analysis and Cybersecurity.
highlights: Research on Trustworthy AI: SciML, probabilistic AI and XAI
Professor in Master's programmes in Data Analysis, Cybersecurity and Smart Energy Systems
Coordinator of the Ulma Handling Systems – MGEP AI Chair
University representative for BDVA and ETAMI

work.name: CEIT – Centro de Estudios e Investigaciones Técnicas de Gipuzkoa
work.summary: Research in intelligent interactive systems and AI applied to motor skills learning.

education.area: Artificial Intelligence – Sistemas Interactivos Inteligentes de Ayuda al Aprendizaje de Destrezas Físicas
Computer Systems Engineering (Sistemen Informatikan Ingenieritza Teknikoa)

publications.name: A Probabilistic Physics-Aware Battery Health Management Approach for Inspection Drone Operations
publications.summary: Physics-aware probabilistic framework for battery health management in inspection drone operations.

publications.name: Novel framework for automated testing of ill-defined human–robot interaction environments
publications.publisher: Journal of Systems and Software, Vol. 231
publications.summary: Novel automated testing framework for human-robot interaction environments.

publications.name: Novel automated interactive reinforcement learning framework with a constraint-based supervisor for procedural tasks
publications.summary: Interactive reinforcement learning framework with constraint-based supervision for procedural tasks.

publications.name: Data-Driven Optimization of Plasma Electrolytic Oxidation (PEO) Coatings with Explainable Artificial Intelligence Insights
publications.summary: XAI-driven optimisation of PEO coating processes.

publications.name: A Novel Approach to Diagnosing Motor Skills
publications.publisher: IEEE Transactions on Learning Technologies, Vol. 7, No. 4, pp. 304–318
publications.summary: Intelligent system for diagnosing and supporting the learning of physical motor skills.

projects.name: SHASAI – Secure Hardware and Software for AI Systems
projects.summary: European project on hardware and software security for AI systems.

projects.name: KMON – Kuantika MONDRAGON
projects.summary: Quantum computing applied to AI algorithms. Principal Investigator.

projects.name: VALU3S – Verification and Validation of Automated Systems' Safety and Security
projects.summary: European H2020 project on V&V of safety and security in automated systems.
